summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 21 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 83 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 66 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 24 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 13 days past due with 21 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 10 payment tasks due this week.

**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 1 upcoming task still unassigned.
**Jeff:** Carrying 21 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

185 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **81 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 41 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 42 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Clifford Clack — Gym Addition and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 20. Keep the momentum going.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 21 overdue (oldest: 13d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 29 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
